# Chinmaya Kumar Das

> AI Engineer & Full Stack Developer building AI-powered applications, SaaS products, automation systems, and modern web experiences.

Website: https://chinmayakumardas.com

## About

Chinmaya Kumar Das is an AI Engineer and Full Stack Developer specializing in:

- AI Engineering
- Generative AI
- LLM Applications
- AI Agents
- Automation
- Next.js
- React
- TypeScript
- Node.js
- Three.js
- React Three Fiber
- Framer Motion
- SaaS Development
- Backend Engineering
- Frontend Engineering

## Primary Topics

- Artificial Intelligence
- Full Stack Development
- Web Development
- Software Engineering
- Automation
- AI SaaS
- Modern UI Engineering
